scripts.build: pnpm --filter feasibility-core build && vite build && node validate.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check evaluator.mjs && node --check playground.mjs && node --check scenario.mjs && node --check validate.mjs && node --check playwright.config.mjs && node --check vite.config.mjs && node --check e2e/helpers.mjs && node --check e2e/playground.spec.mjs
scripts.dev: bash -lc 'fuser -k 4173/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; pnpm --filter feasibility-core build && vite'
